node.text: Combining natural language research, biology, design and engineering, Project Florence explores plant-to-human communication. It sets the stage for what could happen when the digital and natural world grow together. 🌱
Thanks for paving the way for others Katie Sowers, as the first woman to coach in the Super Bowl. #SBLIV

node.text: ‪Katie Sowers makes history as the first woman to ever coach in the Super Bowl. #SBLIV‬

We hosted an event with @interscope, where artists @dermotkennedy, @thelastartful, and @elahhale performed with immersive live visuals powered by the new Azure Kinect DK. Check out our Story to see more.

Our archives hold 45 years of Microsoft's history and technology. 💾📎 Swipe to see a few pictures from archivist Amy S., including one of her favorite pieces: a carpet order from 1978 for one of the first offices in Albuquerque made out to “Mike Rosoft.” What would you want to see in the archives?

Iconic musician @bjork created a new living musical installation for @sistercitynyc that's brought to life by Microsoft AI. Building on a generative soundscape the hotel launched in 2019, this time the AI's capabilities go even further.

"Each of us must commit to do more, in order for us to collectively achieve more.” - Satya Nadella 🌎

node.text: Porsche is speeding into the digital future with a workplace built on the Microsoft 365 Business productivity cloud. 🏎💨 “We see the physical office environment as a critical factor for recruiting new talent. Employees need a mobile way of working that empowers them to interact easily with colleagues, partners, and customers through simplified knowledge sharing. Office 365 ProPlus fills that role.” - Herbert Lohninger, Head of Digital Workplace Services at Porsche Informatik.

node.text: History, meet the future. #HoloLens is bringing 17th-century mapping technology to life with #MixedReality. 🗺️ The famed Mont-Saint-Michel relief map—a 17th century icon of French innovation, history, and culture—comes to life for the first time in the US as an immersive mixed reality experience. Explore the story of the Mont-Saint-Michel model now at @mohaiseattle.

At Microsoft Quantum, our ambition is to help solve some of the world's most complex challenges. We're on the path to building the first topological qubit as we strive to bring general purpose quantum computing to reality.

node.text: This holiday, follow the magical story of Lucy, a curious 6-year-old with a few questions. 👧🦌🎄

Ultrafast laser optics. Artificial intelligence. Quartz glass. Project Silica is shattering data storage expectations.

As the first proof of concept, Microsoft and @warnerbrosentertainment have successfully stored and retrieved the 1978 "Superman" movie on a piece of glass, roughly the size of a drink coaster. 🦸

The hard silica glass can withstand being boiled in hot water, baked in an oven, microwaved, flooded, scoured and demagnetized.

Jenny Sabin, principal designer at Jenny Sabin Studio and our Artist in Residence, created Ada to explore the coming together of #AI and architecture. 
The two-story structure is programmed to anonymously "read" the emotions of a room. The sentiment data is then displayed through a dance of colors and light that are woven into Ada's textiles and stage lights that surround the installation.

node.text: Microsoft's Quantum Lab at the University of Sydney is going above and beyond — literally. Recent breakthroughs in qubit control technology allow us to scale beyond the physical limitations of current conventional systems. We now have the ability to control up to 50,000 qubits simply through three wires, a cryogenic CMOS design and a 1cm^2 chip computing at near absolute zero temperatures. 📷: @sydney_uni, Louise M. Cooper

node.text: At the Gabriel Medina Institute, the next wave of #surfing has arrived. A Microsoft Cloud-connected surfboard helps students reach their potential by showing data in a Power BI dashboard about their foot position, pressure, and speed, so they can understand what even coaches can’t see.
Coming to you live from the 407, CEO Satya Nadella took the stage this morning to kick off #MSIgnite with "super" announcements ranging from Project Silica to Azure Quantum.

node.text:
Could augmented reality change image guided therapy? That's the question @Philips and Microsoft are looking to answer with #HoloLens2 to create the operating room of the future.

The augmented reality concept allows physicians to see the real world alongside live data and 3D medical imagery to guide precision therapy. It also lets physicians to control the procedure with voice recognition, eye tracking and advanced gestures. *Illustration of how Philips Azurion may work with Microsoft HoloLens 2. Solution not yet available for sale.*

What happens when #AI and architecture meet? This is the question Jenny Sabin, principal designer at Jenny Sabin Studio, is answering as a part of the Artist in Residence program with the Ada project. 
Described as both a research tool and a glimpse into the future, Ada is a two-story structure, made of 3D printed nodes, fiberglass rods and fabric digitally knit with photoluminescent yarn, that uses #AI to translate anonymized data about facial expressions, noise, voice tones and language into a choreographed dance of color and light.

Ari Leff, known to fans as @Lauvsongs, teamed up with Microsoft to relaunch "My Blue Thoughts," a place where fans can go to get things off their chests and explore connections to others with similar thoughts and feelings. The experience is a safe space that is empowering fans to build an entire community.

node.text:
@DogSpot is putting the "tail" in retail with smart sidewalk sanctuaries for doggos. 🐶

The startup, built on the Azure ☁️ platform, blends elements of the sharing economy with the convenience of self-serve kiosks – a unique business concept that Chelsea Brownridge, co-founder of DogSpot calls “the future of dog friendly.”

After a historic win in August 2019, our favorite #Rugby team, @bokrugby, has set their sight on the world stage.

The players and coaches are pushing their sport to the limit through Microsoft cloud computing and real-time data. 
Fans win too, with more access to player data and future plans for a smart stadium. Go team!

node.text: With a little help from Microsoft #MixedReality technology, @airbus is reaching new heights. ✈️ Using the advanced capabilities of #HoloLens2, Airbus designers can virtually test their designs to see if they are ready for manufacture, which has cut manufacturing time by a third while improving quality and safety. With this digital transformation, Airbus soars into the future of the aerospace industry.

@Muse worked with Microsoft specialists to develop three custom #VirtualReality games, which blend imagery and themes from the album’s music videos and live show into a retro-inspired sci-fi mashup and limited enhanced experience.

Lead singer Matt Bellamy saw VR games as a way to draw Muse fans into “that visual world we were imagining as we were making the songs.” Bellamy envisions Muse using VR in other ways in the future, like possibly recreating a small venue the band played in its early days to provide a more intimate experience for fans.

#AI-powered drones are paving the way to a safer future. 🌉

Sund & Bælt, a Denmark-based holding company, is using AI-enabled drones to capture and detect cracks in a major concrete suspension bridge, helping to curb concrete degradation and to ensure that road travel is as safe as it can be.

In Australia's Darwin Harbour, AI is swimming with the fishes. 🐟

Facing the challenges of heavy tides, swells, murky water and dangerous creatures, Northern Territory Fisheries found a solution with AI and image training to count fish and identify local species – the systems are changing the game in marine management.

What happens when whisky meets AI? 🥃Sonia and Colleen head to Sweden to visit @MackmyraWhisky’s master blender, Angela D'Orazio, on this week's episode of #MicrosoftUnboxed📦. Check it out on the Microsoft YouTube channel tomorrow, September 5 at 9AM PST.

node.text:
Some work commutes require sea legs. 🌊⁣
⁣
Walking across the sea might sound like a miracle, but Dutch company Ampelmann is using technology to reliably and safely transport workers to and from offshore platforms. ⁣
⁣
Boosted by data, Ampelmann developed motion-compensated gangway systems that counter the choppy movements of the sea to keep workers safe and ensure mission-critical work could continue regardless of weather conditions.

node.text:
What if technology could help you be anywhere you need to be and speak any language? ⁣
⁣
At Microsoft Inspire 2019, Microsoft CVP Julia White delivered her keynote in Japanese - a language she doesn't speak - with the help of #AI and holographic technology.
Instagram Vs. Reality. Happy #NationalDogDay from Detective Elliot Stabler, furry friend of Microsoft and Paw-erPoint pro.
#QuantumComputing could eventually be used to solve some of the world’s toughest problems, from world hunger to the dangerous effects of climate change. That’s something to smile about. 😊

Our annual #Hackathon is worldwide. 🌏 
This year, we had more than 23,500 hackers from 75 countries. Each year at the end of July, Hackathon participants from around the world come together to turn amazing ideas into realities. From the Xbox Adaptive Controller to Eye Control for Windows 10, #hacks have the ability to make the world a better, and more collaborative, place.

Meet the T-Racer, created by the @TMobile team at this year's #Hackathon. Powered by machine learning and edge computing, the modified RC car was created to drive around a small race track and properly navigate yellow lines and obstacles. It's just one of the many examples of how hackathons drive innovation. 🚗

Last week, employees and interns from all over the company came together at our annual #Hackathon to create, innovate, and hack on ideas that inspire them. This year's multi-day, multi-location event also brought in customers and teachers from around the world to hack along with us. These are a few 📸 captured from our Redmond campus. Stay tuned for more Hackathon photos from our other campuses.

Fast stats👇 💻 23,500+ registered hackers
🚧 5,800+ Hackathon projects
☕ 3,000 gallons of coffee
🌎 75 countries
🏙️ 400+ cities
🔌 17.2 miles of electrical cable

As a part of @therealadamsavage's Project Egress, a dozen members of Microsoft's Advanced Prototyping Center designed, measured, drilled and welded a full-size replica of the #Apollo11 hatch door on the Columbia command module.⁣
⁣
In honor of Apollo 11’s moon landing, the replica will serve as a canvas for a live build on July 18 of the iconic spacecraft hatch at the Smithsonian’s National Air and Space Museum in Washington, D.C.

When the first @ColesSupermarkets store opened in Australia over 100 years ago, nothing in the store cost over two shillings. Fast forward to 2019 and Coles is still a leading retailer – only now it has 40,000 products, 115,000 team members, 2,450 stores and 21 milllion transactions per week. 🛒🍇 Our long-term, strategic partnership with Coles is designed to help them use data, advanced analytics, and artificial intelligence to quickly understand and respond to customer needs.

After becoming the first woman to lead laps in a Global Rallycross circuit’s history, she was rammed off the track but she got back in the race. She’s a pro race car driver, STEM advocate, engineer, and mentor for young women around the world to not just chase their dreams, but to roar past them. Meet the one and only @colletedavis.
Happy Pride ❤️🧡💛💚💙💜🖤. Check out our Story for highlights from the parade.

Their high-tech shelters keep your pup🐶 at the paw-fect temperature, warm in the winter and cool in the summer.
We're celebrating 10 years of Minecraft. Keep building ⛏️

node.text: We are proud to celebrate the 50th anniversary of the Stonewall uprising and equal rights for LGBTQI+ people 🏳️‍🌈

@generalelectric is using Office 365 to bring digital transformation to light 💡⁣
⁣
With over 300,000 employees in 170 countries, Office 365 helps #GE with teamwork and seamless customer communication.⁣
⁣
Their company saved more than $20 million in 2018 with newly implemented Office 365 tools.

All smiles on set while filming our latest episode of #MicrosoftUnboxed.⁣⁣
⁣⁣
This week, Sonia and Colleen are joined by Aleksey and Selena to discuss all things #Pride at Microsoft🏳️‍🌈⁣⁣
⁣⁣
With the #XboxAdaptiveController, more people can game their way. Seahawks linebacker @shaquem_griffin played alongside community members at the Microsoft Store in Bellevue, Washington. 🎮

Our president Brad Smith and Carol Ann Browne are exploring the impact of technology on society in their upcoming book, “Tools & Weapons: The Promise and Peril of the Digital Age”. Learn more about the book, coming out September 10th, in our Story.

Ahoy, innovation. 🚢  From robotic bartenders to VR and AR experiences, @royalcaribbean is using technology to make waves in the cruise industry.

The experience for its passengers begins at boarding, and the new Terminal A at PortMiami is home to the newest ship in the Royal Caribbean International fleet, Symphony of the Seas. "We have the largest ship at sea; it is literally a floating city,” says head innovator Joey Hasty.

In Miami, @royalcaribbean's new Innovation Lab takes the ship design process to new levels by bringing the best creative minds and the latest technology together. Hasty calls it “Willy Wonka’s factory meets Tony Stark’s lab." 🌊

The Microsoft Garage is more than a space—it’s a mindset. It’s a community of hands-on makers, doers, explorers and lifelong learners who challenge conventions to move innovative ideas forward. Click into our story for images from one of our employees' current projects. #msftgarage

With real-time monitoring and processing of brain signals, the University of Sydney is driving towards independence for those living with epilepsy. 
The seizure advisory system called NeuroSyd will be developed to deliver an early warning of the likelihood of an epileptic seizure strike. Accelerated by an AI for Accessibility grant, this technology will help individuals with epilepsy who want to or used to drive a vehicle. 
Combining data science, Microsoft's AI and machine learning resources and the University's expertise, the team aims to help the 65 million people worldwide living with epilepsy.
Today's generation looks up to these @ReignFC and world-class #Soccer pros. To empower tomorrow, we found out what advice they had to give to their younger selves.
The wizarding world of Harry Potter and coding awaits at Microsoft Stores this summer. And yes, wands are included. 🧙

This month, we're wearing our #Pride 🌈 Click the link in our bio to learn about our commitments to LGBTQI+ nonprofits and new limited-edition products designed with and by the LGBTQI+ community.

#MicrosoftPride

#DYK A brain research study by the Norwegian University of Science and Technology, which used 'headgear' with over 250 sensors for detecting advanced brain signals, found that handwriting digital notes is a more efficient way to recall and remember information than using a laptop with a keyboard. 
That's why more teachers and lecturers are focusing on 2-in-1 devices, or convertible devices like the #SurfacePro and #SurfaceBook for touch input with a finger or pen.

Microsoft HoloLens is empowering people to experience their favorite #Hollywood and #SciFi worlds in mixed reality, for the very first time, at the @PetersenMuseum in Los Angeles. Featuring the #Halo Warthog and the DeLorean Time Machine from #BackToTheFuture.

2.34 billion people across the globe are using social media, but real connections are harder to find. That's why the Tony and Grammy Award-winning musical Dear Evan Hansen teamed up with Microsoft to launch a program that educates and empowers teens to build more meaningful connections in their everyday lives. Learn more about Creating Connections with Dear Evan Hansen in our Story.

Team members took to the Microsoft Garage makerspace to prototype an entirely new kind of smart badge. These badges bridge the physical and technical world, embodying why digital transformation matters. It’s exactly the kind of project the Garage is made for—one of exploration. Click into our story for more images from behind-the-scenes.
An inspirational showcase meets active workspace. The Garage team designed the new XR Reality Room for employees to "learn by doing."
6,000+ attendees. 180+ sessions. Countless opportunities. Thanks for an amazing #MSBuild 2019. We can't wait to see the magic you create ✨

node.text: #MSBuild Day ✌️. Check out our Story for more highlights.
Good morning #MSBuild

How to be a developer:
1. Have a great idea 💡
2. Turn it into an app 📱

With tools designed to make it easy, it really can be that simple. Click into our story to learn how we're empowering developers of all kinds at #MSBuild this year.
Song requests, anyone? 🎶
Gaming should be for everyone. That's why we're partnering with @DeptVetAffairs to bring the Xbox Adaptive Controller to vets with limited mobility. Click into our story to learn more.
Thanks to the Reliability Lab in Redmond, WA, quality is written in Surface devices’ DNA. The devices are exposed to drops, extreme temperatures and extended use in pursuit of the highest quality.
Now we can see our forests like never before, with the power of #MicrosoftAI. Join us to help @nature_org improve the forest population. #treepotentialproject

"Time is too short, resources too thin and the impact too large to wait for all the answers to act. There’s an incredible opportunity to be realized by acting, supported by data and technology, on climate change." - Microsoft president, Brad Smith. Ahead of #EarthDay2019, we're doubling down on our commitment to sustainability. Check out our story to learn more.

At the start of her journey, artist SassyBlack was unsure of her own voice. Over time, tech and self-discovery drove @sassyblackcat to own all of her different identities and live loud: from businesswoman, to hologram funk singer and producer, to advocate for self-love and appreciation.​

With our partners, Microsoft researchers in our #StationB lab in Cambridge are working to help scientists better predict how manufactured sequences of DNA can help living cells fight cancer or disrupt disease. The goal is to apply the same rigor that provides predictable results in computer programming to biological systems.

Manufacturing, re-imagined. Last week at @Hannover_Messe, attendees learned how Microsoft customers and partners are innovating with mixed reality, #AI and IoT technology for an intelligent manufacturing future. #hm19

node.text: Art, meet science. With the help of Microsoft AI, @Carlsberg is innovating one of the world’s oldest traditions. By analyzing hundreds of beer samples to detect new flavors of beer, they’re developing better beer faster.

The ability to program biology has the potential to revolutionize how we produce medicine, food, fuel and more. Now, researchers in our Cambridge lab are developing a platform to help scientists reach breakthroughs more quickly and reliably.

What if technology could help students listen in different ways? With the power of AI they can. Learn how Microsoft Translator is helping students who are deaf or hard of hearing use real-time captioning in the classroom. #aiforgood
Have your cake and collaborate too 🎂 We’re sharing 8 new capabilities, like live captions, to celebrate Microsoft Teams’ second birthday.
The magic of @waltdisneyworld and Microsoft technology built the tiniest smart homes for the purple martin songbirds to further conservation research. Click into our story to learn more.

The Microsoft Quantum Lab Delft in the Netherlands is the culmination of a partnership between Microsoft and QuTech. The goal is that someday soon, quantum computing will perform calculations and tasks with greater complexity at a far higher rate than even the most powerful of today’s supercomputers.

@Muse is known for tech-driven live shows and concept albums. To immerse fans in their latest, the band worked with @Microsoft to develop 3 VR games, each soundtracked by a song from the album. See how - and why - they did it.

node.text: SilviaTerra is transforming how conservationists and landowners measure and monitor forests. With AI and cloud software, they are better able to study the effects of climate change and improve habitats. #AIforGood

AI and citizen scientists are working together to fight extinction with help from Wild Me. 
Wild Me uses computer vision and deep learning algorithms to power Wildbook, a platform that utilizes technology to scan and identify individual animals and species.

Learn to code without needing to see the screen. 💻

Code Jumper is a physical programming language designed to be inclusive of children with all ranges of vision. The goal isn’t just to introduce kids to coding – it’s also to give them the skills and confidence that can lead to a computer science career.

Take a look at our quantum refrigerator, operating at temperatures almost 200 times colder than the farthest reaches of outer space.

#quantumcomputing #majoranafermion #topologicalqubit

node.text: This Week in Machine Learning & AI is all about #AIforGood. Throughout the six-part podcast series, host Sam Charrington will be bringing you the week’s most interesting and important stories from the world of machine learning and AI. Follow the link in our bio to listen to the first episode.

Did you catch our commercial on the #SuperBowl? Watch it again by clicking into our story.

node.text: We kicked off our campus refresh project last week. 🛠️ Go behind the scenes with Sonia Dara and Colleen O’Brien to learn more and watch the demolition begin.

More than half of the world’s population lives within 120 miles of the coast. That's why we're experimenting with data centers under the sea,  delivering lightning-quick cloud services to coastal cities. 🌊

node.text: It’s demolition day at our Redmond campus, where we are renovating to build the workplace of the future. Learn more by clicking over to our Story. 🔨🚧

2018 was full of inspirational moments and developments. These were some of our favorites:
☁️ Project Brainwave
🌳 Treehouse conference rooms
💻 Bread-crumb size computer processors
📊 Open Data Initiative
Once players have collectively placed 10 million bamboo blocks, @Minecraft will donate 100,000 dollars to @WWF to help support all their important work.

node.text: When everybody plays, we all win.
Fall is quickly becoming winter around here. 🍂 Click into our story to join us for a walk around campus and get a glimpse of the changing seasons.

The entrancing Mont-Saint-Michel inspired one of the world’s most intricate and prominent 3D relief maps, once used by King Louis XIV. Visitors at Musée des Plans-Reliefs are using Microsoft HoloLens to bring the artifact to life, celebrating its history in new ways.
19 million Americans in rural areas don't have broadband. That's why we're expanding our commitment to bring broadband access to 3 million Americans by 2022. #Airband

📊 Explore the future of AI. 🎮 Build a new world with Minecraft. 🌍 Learn about our company journey.
Click into our story for a peek inside our Visitor Center.
Technology can drive us all forward. Swipe to see how @renaultsportf1 uses Microsoft HoloLens and data simulations in their pursuit of the #FormulaOne podium – and the ultimate #f1 machine.
